## isTwoWay() function

Returns true if the target is a two-way binding or follows the two-way binding contract. Returns false if not.

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare function isTwoWay<T>(target: TwoWayBindable<T> | undefined): target is TwoWayBinding<T>;
```
